status.description:
Equivalent to HL7's ORC.5. Defaults to `"N"`.
Value | Notes
----- | -----
`"N"` | not sent                                          |
`"Q"` | queued for processing                             |
`"A"` | `ABN (Advance Beneficiary Notice)` required       |
`"S"` | send                                              |
`"R"` | results received                                  |
`"E"` | error                                             |
status.title: Status

items.description: ID of an associated lab document

timestamp.description: Time at which the order was submitted. Defaults to now
timestamp.title: Timestamp

requisition_id.description: The ID printed on the requisition PDF. Generally the same as id.
requisition_id.title: Requisition id

external_requisition_id.description: Alternative requisition ID field for orders created outside of DrChrono.
external_requisition_id.title: External Requisition ID

description.description: Short description  of the ICD-10 code
description.title: Description

icd10_codes.description: ICD-10 codes of the conditions which the tests concerns.
icd10_codes.title: Icd10 codes
